purpose: Define which prompt/output rule files must be included when API sends a scene_contract to ChatGPT.
core_rules: ChatGPT receives already assembled scene_contract from API/builder.
ChatGPT must not scan the whole repository or invent missing context.
Character behavior must come from loaded full character cards and state/character_memory only.
Relationship dynamics must come only from loaded relevant relationship_pairs.
Past files are usable only when loaded by a trigger.
Forbidden context has priority over drama and prose quality.
All state changes are proposed_updates only; API applies or rejects them.
forbidden_output_behaviors: Do not claim files were updated by ChatGPT.
Do not reveal hidden past without trigger.
Do not add absent characters as active speakers.
Do not make major POV choices for the player.
Do not output all relationship pairs or all character states.
Do not use missing context as if it were loaded.
